title: Find A Tote By Entering A Location Number On The Container Selection Screen
summary: Use the Container Selection screen to look up a tote by entering a location number and identifying the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if it is present in the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to locate a tote in the system from a known location number using the Container Selection screen.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to perform tote recovery, swap, remove, or re-add actions.
Do not use this runbook to remove AGVs or make other control changes in the interface.
Do not invent additional search or recovery steps if the tote is not found from the entered location number.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Container Selection screen, enter the known location number, and review the rack or AGV result shown by the system.

safety_notes: This candidate is based primarily on OCR text in the training material rather than a clearly narrated live demonstration.
The source packet includes nearby training cautions about where not to click in the interface and warns against removing AGVs on an active system.
If the tote is not found in the system from the entered location number, stop at the screen result and escalate rather than attempting unsupported follow-on actions.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Known location number for the tote

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The tote location number is known.
The tote must be present in the system for a rack or AGV result to be shown.

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the Container Selection view for tote lookup, including location entry, rack or AGV selection, and container metadata fields.

steps.title: Open the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen used for tote lookup by location number.
steps.instruction: Open the Container Selection screen used for tote or container lookup.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible and ready for lookup activity.
steps.healthy_condition: The Container Selection screen is displayed with the lookup area and container/location details visible.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not accessible or the operator cannot reach the lookup view.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Container Selection screen and the area used for location-based tote lookup.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the Container Selection screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.text: Open the Container Selection screen. [Image support needed: screenshot showing the location number entry area on the Container Selection screen.]
Training slide showing the container selection view for totes, including rack/container color indicators, tote lookup, and container metadata fields.
Container Selection screen for tote or container lookup. Shows container ID, location, layer count, logic ID, and rack or AGV association.

steps.title: Enter the location number
steps.purpose: Search for the tote using the known location number.
steps.instruction: Type the known location number into the location field shown on the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The entered location number is accepted by the screen as the lookup input.
steps.healthy_condition: The location number appears in the location field and is available for lookup on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: The location number cannot be entered, is not accepted by the screen, or does not produce a usable lookup state.

actions.label: Enter location number
actions.exact_action: Type the location number into the location field shown on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The location field on the Container Selection screen where the location number is typed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the location field is not visible or the location number cannot be entered.

source_evidence.text: Type the location number into the location field shown on the screen.
OCR also references finding a tote by typing a location number and selecting the rack or AGV where it is located.

steps.title: Select the rack or AGV result
steps.purpose: Identify where the tote is located in the system after lookup.
steps.instruction: Use the screen to select the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if it is in the system.
steps.expected_result: A rack or AGV associated with the entered location number is selected on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows a selectable rack or AGV result corresponding to the tote location.
steps.failure_condition: No rack or AGV result is shown for the entered location number, or the tote is not found in the system.

actions.label: Select rack or AGV
actions.exact_action: Use the screen to select the rack or AGV where the tote is located if it is in the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The rack or AGV selection area associated with the entered location number.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the tote is not found in the system from the entered location number.
Stop and escalate if the source does not provide a supported follow-on action for the missing result.

source_evidence.text: Use the screen to select the rack or AGV where the tote is located if it is in the system.
OCR also references finding a tote by typing a location number and selecting the rack or AGV where it is located.
If the tote is not found in the system from the entered location number, stop at the screen result and escalate rather than inventing additional search steps.

steps.title: Review the tote or container information
steps.purpose: Confirm the lookup result and identify the tote or container details shown by the system.
steps.instruction: Review the selected result for the tote or container information shown on the screen, including the tote number if displayed.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify the tote or container information associated with the selected rack or AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected result shows tote or container details such as the tote number, box icon, location, or related metadata.
steps.failure_condition: The selected result does not show enough tote or container information to confirm the lookup result.

actions.label: Review displayed tote details
actions.exact_action: Review the selected result for the tote or container information shown on the screen, including the tote number if displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The selected result details, including any tote number, box icon, location, logic ID, layer count, or container fields shown on the screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop and escalate if the selected result does not clearly identify the tote or container.
Stop and escalate if additional follow-on actions are needed, because the source does not provide them.

source_evidence.text: Review the selected result for the tote or container information shown on the screen, including the tote number if displayed.
OCR indicates dark blue means a tote is present and light blue represents an empty rack, and that selecting a location can show a box icon and tote number.
Shows container ID, location, layer count, logic ID, and rack or AGV association.

success_criteria: The operator enters a known location number on the Container Selection screen.
The system shows the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if the tote is in the system.
The operator can review the displayed tote or container information, including the tote number if shown.
healthy_conditions: The Container Selection screen is accessible.
The location number can be entered into the location field.
A rack or AGV result is shown for the entered location number.
The selected result displays tote or container details such as tote number, box icon, location, or related metadata.
failure_conditions: The Container Selection screen cannot be accessed.
The location number cannot be entered or is not accepted by the screen.
The tote is not found in the system from the entered location number.
The source does not provide supported follow-on actions beyond the lookup and selection steps.
escalation_guidance: If the tote is not found in the system from the entered location number, stop at the screen result and escalate.
Do not invent additional search, recovery, or correction steps not supported by the source.
If the interface does not clearly show the tote or container details needed to confirm the result, escalate for further support.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen used for location-based tote lookup and rack or AGV selection.

missing_details: The source does not provide exact control names for the location entry field or selection controls.
The source does not provide a detailed navigation path to open the Container Selection screen.
The source does not provide explicit follow-on actions when no tote is found.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing the lookup.
The source evidence is primarily OCR-based rather than a fully narrated step-by-step demonstration.
